target: Audit the implemented UX against the v1 gates, harden copy, and verify action truthfulness across CLI, tmux, desktop, and mobile surfaces.
invariants: The UI must remain a derived supervisory surface, not a second source of truth.
Desktop and mobile must consume the same shared state model.
Neon accents are structural; state color and explicit text remain primary.

commit.message: Audit UX copy and v1 gates

steps.task: Audit and refine UI and CLI copy so labels remain procedural, stable, and truthful across all surfaces.
requirements: Allowed action labels remain Ensure, Attach, Respawn, Reset Layout, Doctor, and Down.
Do not introduce vague labels such as Fix, Heal, Boost, or Optimize.

steps.task: Run the v1 UX gate audit against the action matrix, component map, and v1 cut line so unsupported or drifted behaviors are caught.
requirements: Do not add new product features in this packet.
Keep the audit tied to the approved v1 cut line.

steps.task: Add or run final integration checks for action label truthfulness and shared-state rendering across dashboard and mobile surfaces.
requirements: Keep the audit empirical and falsifiable.
